          UnknownAction,
      > & Dispatch<UnknownAction>

      Returns ThunkDispatch<
          {
              auth: AuthState;
              ui: UiState;
              cart: CartState;
              notifications: NotificationState;
              authApi: CombinedState<
                  {

                      >;

                          "Auth" | "User",
                          AuthResponse,

                          unknown,
                      >;

                          BaseQueryFn<string | FetchArgs, unknown, FetchBaseQueryError>,

                          void,
                          BaseQueryFn<string | FetchArgs, unknown, FetchBaseQueryError>,
                          "Auth" | "User",
                          {
                              id: string;
                              name: string;
                              email: string;
                              phone: string;
                              type: string;
                              storeId?: string;
                              isActive: boolean;
                          },
                          "authApi",
                          unknown,
                      >;
                  },
                  "Auth"
                  | "User",
                  "authApi",
              >;
              orderApi: CombinedState<
                  {
                      getOrders: QueryDefinition<
                          {
                              storeId?: string;
                              status?: string;
                              startDate?: string;
                              endDate?: string;
                          },

                              string
                              | FetchArgs,
                              unknown,
                              FetchBaseQueryError,
                              {},
                              FetchBaseQueryMeta,
                          >,
                          "Customer" | "Order" | "Orders" | "KitchenQueue",
                          Order[],
                          "orderApi",
                          unknown,
                      >;

                          string,
                          BaseQueryFn<
                              string
                              | FetchArgs,
                              unknown,

                              {},

                          >,

                          string,
                          BaseQueryFn<
                              string
                              | FetchArgs,
                              unknown,
                              FetchBaseQueryError,
                              {},
                              FetchBaseQueryMeta,
                          >,

                          string
                          | undefined,
                          BaseQueryFn<
                              string
                              | FetchArgs,
                              unknown,
                              FetchBaseQueryError,
                              {},
                              FetchBaseQueryMeta,
                          >,
